things.name: Apartheid Museum
things.description: Powerful and moving museum telling the story of South Africa's apartheid era

things.name: Soweto
things.description: Historic township with Vilakazi Street (Mandela and Tutu homes), Hector Pieterson Memorial

things.name: Constitution Hill
things.description: Old Fort Prison complex and Constitutional Court - South Africa's journey to democracy

things.name: Gold Reef City
things.description: Theme park on an old gold mine with underground tours and fairground rides

things.name: Maboneng Precinct
things.description: Creative arts district with galleries, studios, markets and the best street food

things.name: Cradle of Humankind
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage fossil hominid site with Sterkfontein Caves

things.name: Pilanesberg National Park
things.description: Big Five game reserve just 2 hours from Jo'burg in an ancient volcanic crater

things.name: Neighbourgoods Market
things.description: Vibrant Saturday food and craft market in the Braamfontein creative hub

things.name: Nelson Mandela National Museum (Liliesleaf)
things.description: Farm where Mandela was arrested in 1962, now an important apartheid history site

things.name: Lion & Safari Park
things.description: Drive-through reserve with lions, cheetahs and giraffes just north of the city
